subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Whatsoever the Hands of the Cause of God deem advisable, obey thou and ever act accordingly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق آنچه ایادی امرالله مصلحت دانند اطاعت نما و بهمانقسم حرکت کن ابدا
subcodes.subjects: @effort; striving, @work as worship, @Hands of the Cause, @excellence; distinction
